creator: hartzell@alerce.com
text:
Edwin Groothuis writes:
 > Maintainer of www/p5-CGI-Application-Plugin-MessageStack,
 > 
 > Please note that PR ports/108652 has just been submitted.
 > 
 > If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
 > you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
 > and a committer will take care of it.
 > 
 > The full text of the PR can be found at:
 >     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/108652

As maintainer of this port, I approve of this patch.

Thanks,

g.
